description: Composition Multicoloured printed kurta made of lightweight 100% cotton, has short puff sleeves, a V-neck, full front opening with buttoned placket, covered buttons, pintucks starting from front yoke and opening out at waist, yoke at back with slight gathers below, elasticated waist, side vents and curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Dry in shade Do not bleach or tumble dry Warm iron This kurta is made of soft lightweight cotton which – along with the short sleeves, will keep you cool in warm weather. The bright print will lift your mood while the sweet puff sleeves and covered buttons keep you looking feminine. Wear this kurta over jeans or leggings depending on the occasion and dress it up with bright ethnic jewellery. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
